arguments.Description: "Fix compile error: change EdgeInsets.bottom to EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 15) in bottom sheet drag handle."
arguments.Instruction: "Fix margin layout on bottom sheet drag handle."
arguments.ReplacementContent:
"                  Center(
                    child: Container(
                      width: 40,
                      height: 5,
                      margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 15),
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: _isDark ? Colors.grey[700] : Colors.grey[300],
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),"
arguments.TargetContent:
"                  Center(
                    child: Container(
                      width: 40,
                      height: 5,
                      margin: const EdgeInsets.bottom(15),
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        color: _isDark ? Colors.grey[700] : Colors.grey[300],
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),"
